rulings.Case Title: SUSAN RUBENSTEIN VS. CHRISTOPHER D LILJENSTOLPE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement And Claims Bar
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, October 14, 2016 line 1. CROSS DEFENDANT's JANE POPPELREITER, PARAGON REAL ESTATE GROUP OF SAN FRANCISCO, INC.'s Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement GRANTED. Moving party meets Tech-Built factors. No opposition filed. = (501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: SUSAN MOLTHEN INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA AL-MASRI VS. TOPWELL INVESTMENT INC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Production Of Documents And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, October 14, 2016 line 2. DEFENDANT TOPWELL INVESTMENT INC's Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Production Of Documents And For Sanctions GRANTED as follows: By October 17, 2016 (1) Plaintiff shall produce the documents or (2) Plaintiff shall produce verified response to the Request to Production stating that Plaintiff did not document any of her business losses occasioned by Defendant's alleged breaches. Defendant's request for sanctions is granted in the amount of $2,335. = (501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: ANA VANDERLEY VS. JAMES D KELLY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff Authorization For Release Of Medical Records
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, October 14, 2016 line 3. DEFENDANT JAMES KELLY, KAREN YOKOO's Motion To Compel Plaintiff Authorization For Release Of Medical Records continued to November 23, 2016. Discovery in this action is stayed for 30 days per October 13, 2016 order. Moving and opposing party shall file a joint supplemental brief by November 21, 2016 not to exceed 3 pages to address progress, if any, in their meet and confer efforts. = (501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: JEANNETTE CAROLINA TORRES ET AL VS. LI WEN XIANG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Permitting The Inspection Of Real Property Located At 128 Bartlett Street, San Francisco, California, After The Discovery Cut-Off Date And An Order Shortening The Time For Response To A Notice For Site Inspection
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, October 14, 2016 line 4. PLAINTIFF JEANNETTE TORRES, MATTHEW SMALL's Motion For An Order Permitting The Inspection Of Real Property Located At 128 Bartlett Street, San Francisco, California, After The Discovery Cut-Off Date And An Order Shortening The Time For Response To A Notice For Site Inspection DENIED. = (501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: JAMES D BANKS VS. THE TESTATE AND INTESTATE SUCCESSORS OF ALINE F. B ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Deeming Admitted Truth Of Facts And Genuiness Of Documents, And Imposing Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant 4 And Defendant 6
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, October 14, 2016 line 5. PLAINTIFF JAMES BANKS' Motion For Order Deeming Admitted Truth Of Facts And Genuiness Of Documents, And Imposing Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant 4 And Defendant 6 GRANTED. No opposition filed. Sanctions granted in the amount of $71 as to each defendant. = (501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: BERTHA P PANG VS. DOUGLAS BAIRD ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Defendant Douglas Bairds Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, October 14, 2016 line 6. DEFENDANT DOUGLAS BAIRD's Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint Defendant and counsel David DeMordaunt shall provide a supplemental declaration no later than 9:00 a.m. on October 14, 2016 specifying the dates (1) commissioning of the survey (paragraph 3 of DeMordaunt Declaration) and (2) completion of the survey (paragraph 4 of DeMordaunt Declaration). Courtesy copy of the declaration to be delivered to department 501 by 9:15 a.m. = (501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: LARRY E ODBERT VS. DONALD PIPKINS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Impose Terminating Sanctions Against Defts George Hallond And Joe Henderson
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, October 14, 2016 line 7. PLAINTIFF LARRY ODBERT's Motion To Impose Terminating Sanctions Against Defts George Hallond And Joe Henderson GRANTED, subject to opposition. The order shall be stayed as follows: (1) Defendants shall remit sanctions in the amount of $2,850 to Plaintiff via certified funds/cash within 5 days of notice of entry of order and (2) Defendants shall appear for deposition within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Plaintiff shall serve this order and new notice of deposition by overnight mail. Plaintiff may appear ex-parte to lift the stay is Defendants fail to comply with this order. = (501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: BRIAN KLIMENT VS. RYAN LOCKHART ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deposition And Production Of Documents
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, October 14, 2016 line 8. PLAINTIFF BRIAN KLIMENT's Motion To Compel Deposition And Production Of Documents GRANTED, subject to opposition. Defendant shall appear for deposition and produce documents within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Plaintiff shall serve the order and notice of deposition by overnight mail. Trial is continued to October 31, 2016 to allow Plaintiff to complete necessary discovery (deposition). Sanctions granted in the amount of $660. = (501/SRB)
